case_title: SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. VS. ENERGE CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 58496514) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT ENERGE CORPORATION

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT ENERGE CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-06-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-05-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-14-2015

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-29-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-17-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENERGE CORPORATION $29,826.72 PRINCIPAL, $6,686.32 INTEREST, $715.37 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $37,228.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58526481)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-29-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-06-2016 CONTINUED TO FEB-17-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58526481), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. SERVED SEP-04-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENERGE CORPORATION
